description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build-test-cpu, build-test-cpu-release, and build-gpu, all running on ubuntu-18.04. The build-test-cpu job should build and test taco for CPU, build-test-cpu-release should build and test taco for CPU in release mode, and build-gpu should build taco for GPU without running tests.
